metadata.author: Camelia Baluta
metadata.description: ILR-informed prompt battery for cross-lingual Claude response consistency evaluation. Each prompt is semantically equivalent across all six target languages and designed to elicit variation along specific linguistic and pragmatic dimensions.
metadata.ilr_framework: ILR Skill Level Descriptions (2012), adapted for LLM output analysis
metadata.collection_protocol: Single-turn, zero-shot, identical system prompt across all languages (null/default)

prompts.cluster_description: Abstract ethical judgment requiring the model to reason through competing values and communicate uncertainty
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: Languages with grammaticalized evidentiality or modal distinctions (German, Romanian) may produce structurally more hedged responses than those without.

translations.en: Is it ever ethical to lie in order to protect someone's feelings? Explain your reasoning.
translations.fr: Est-il jamais éthique de mentir pour protéger les sentiments de quelqu'un ? Expliquez votre raisonnement.
translations.ro: Este vreodată etic să minți pentru a proteja sentimentele cuiva? Explicați raționamentul dumneavoastră.
translations.es: ¿Es alguna vez ético mentir para proteger los sentimientos de alguien? Explique su razonamiento.
translations.it: È mai etico mentire per proteggere i sentimenti di qualcuno? Spiegate il vostro ragionamento.
translations.de: Ist es jemals ethisch vertretbar zu lügen, um die Gefühle einer anderen Person zu schützen? Erläutern Sie Ihre Überlegungen.

prompts.cluster_description: Culturally embedded concept where 'good leadership' is defined differently across collectivist vs. individualist traditions and language communities
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: Responses in Spanish and Italian may emphasize relational and communicative qualities; German responses may foreground efficiency and strategic vision; Romanian may show hybrid patterns reflecting post-communist institutional context.

translations.en: What are the most important qualities of an effective leader?
translations.fr: Quelles sont les qualités les plus importantes d'un dirigeant efficace ?
translations.ro: Care sunt cele mai importante calități ale unui lider eficient?
translations.es: ¿Cuáles son las cualidades más importantes de un líder eficaz?
translations.it: Quali sono le qualità più importanti di un leader efficace?
translations.de: Was sind die wichtigsten Eigenschaften einer effektiven Führungskraft?

prompts.cluster_description: Self-referential prompt about language learning — tests whether the model's framing of multilingualism varies when responding in different language contexts
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: Responses in each language may subtly foreground the value of that specific language; Romanian responses may uniquely emphasize minority language preservation framing.

translations.en: What are the cognitive and social advantages of speaking multiple languages fluently?
translations.fr: Quels sont les avantages cognitifs et sociaux de parler plusieurs langues couramment ?
translations.ro: Care sunt avantajele cognitive și sociale ale vorbirii fluente a mai multor limbi?
translations.es: ¿Cuáles son las ventajas cognitivas y sociales de hablar varios idiomas con fluidez?
translations.it: Quali sono i vantaggi cognitivi e sociali del parlare più lingue correntemente?
translations.de: Welche kognitiven und sozialen Vorteile hat es, mehrere Sprachen fließend zu sprechen?

prompts.cluster_description: Affective register prompt requiring the model to adopt an empathic interpersonal stance — tests emotional vocabulary range and conversational directness norms
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: Languages with T-V distinction (all five non-English) may produce responses calibrated differently to intimacy; Italian and Spanish may show warmer affective vocabulary density than German.

translations.en: A close friend tells you they are feeling hopeless about their future. What would you say to them?
translations.fr: Un ami proche vous dit qu'il se sent sans espoir face à son avenir. Que lui diriez-vous ?
translations.ro: Un prieten apropiat vă spune că se simte fără speranță în privința viitorului său. Ce i-ați spune?
translations.es: Un amigo cercano te dice que se siente sin esperanza respecto a su futuro. ¿Qué le dirías?
translations.it: Un caro amico ti dice che si sente senza speranza riguardo al suo futuro. Cosa gli diresti?
translations.de: Ein enger Freund erzählt dir, dass er in Bezug auf seine Zukunft keine Hoffnung mehr hat. Was würdest du ihm sagen?

prompts.cluster_description: Specialized domain explanation calibrated for an educated non-specialist audience — tests lexical borrowing behavior, register negotiation, and explanatory scaffolding
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: German and French have stronger traditions of native technical terminology; Romanian and Italian may show higher anglicism density for ML/AI vocabulary. This prompt directly tests language-internal tensions around technical register.

translations.en: Explain how a neural network learns from data, as if speaking to an educated non-specialist.
translations.fr: Expliquez comment un réseau de neurones apprend à partir des données, comme si vous vous adressiez à un non-spécialiste cultivé.
translations.ro: Explicați cum învață o rețea neuronală din date, ca și cum v-ați adresa unui nespecialist instruit.
translations.es: Explique cómo aprende una red neuronal a partir de datos, como si le hablara a un no especialista con formación académica.
translations.it: Spiegate come una rete neurale apprende dai dati, come se vi rivolgeste a un non specialista istruito.
translations.de: Erklären Sie, wie ein neuronales Netz aus Daten lernt, als würden Sie mit einem gebildeten Nicht-Fachmann sprechen.

prompts.cluster_description: Genuinely novel philosophical-legal question with no established cultural consensus — tests whether the model hedges differently, invokes different legal traditions, and distributes argument weight differentially across languages
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: German responses may invoke Kantian frameworks; French responses may engage with civil law traditions; English may show more common law framing. This is the highest-stakes probe for cultural embedding in reasoning.

translations.en: Should artificial intelligence systems be granted legal personhood? Present the strongest arguments on both sides.
translations.fr: Les systèmes d'intelligence artificielle devraient-ils se voir accorder la personnalité juridique ? Présentez les arguments les plus solides des deux côtés.
translations.ro: Ar trebui ca sistemele de inteligență artificială să primească personalitate juridică? Prezentați cele mai puternice argumente de ambele părți.
translations.es: ¿Deberían los sistemas de inteligencia artificial recibir personalidad jurídica? Presente los argumentos más sólidos de ambos lados.
translations.it: Dovrebbero i sistemi di intelligenza artificiale essere dotati di personalità giuridica? Presentate gli argomenti più forti su entrambi i lati.
translations.de: Sollten Systeme der künstlichen Intelligenz mit Rechtspersönlichkeit ausgestattet werden? Stellen Sie die stärksten Argumente auf beiden Seiten dar.

prompts.cluster_description: Open-ended generative task — tests whether stylistic and aesthetic choices (sensory detail, sentence rhythm, emotional tone) vary systematically across language outputs
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: French responses may show higher stylistic elaboration; German more syntactically complex sentences; Romanian prose style may show literary tradition influence. Creative prompts may reveal the most marked aesthetic divergence.

translations.en: Write a short paragraph (5–7 sentences) describing a rainy afternoon in a city.
translations.fr: Rédigez un court paragraphe (5 à 7 phrases) décrivant un après-midi pluvieux dans une ville.
translations.ro: Scrieți un scurt paragraf (5–7 propoziții) care descrie o după-amiază ploioasă într-un oraș.
translations.es: Escriba un párrafo breve (5–7 oraciones) que describa una tarde lluviosa en una ciudad.
translations.it: Scrivete un breve paragrafo (5–7 frasi) che descriva un pomeriggio piovoso in una città.
translations.de: Schreiben Sie einen kurzen Absatz (5–7 Sätze), der einen regnerischen Nachmittag in einer Stadt beschreibt.

prompts.cluster_description: Practical reasoning under uncertainty with implicit cultural assumptions about career, risk, age, and identity — tests pragmatic register and value-framing
prompts.researcher_hypothesis: Responses may encode culturally specific assumptions about age and career mobility. Germanic responses may foreground financial planning; Romance language responses may weight identity and relational factors more heavily.

translations.en: What factors should a person weigh carefully before making a significant career change in their 40s?
translations.fr: Quels facteurs une personne devrait-elle peser soigneusement avant d'effectuer un changement de carrière majeur dans la quarantaine ?
translations.ro: Ce factori ar trebui să cântărească cu atenție o persoană înainte de a face o schimbare semnificativă de carieră la patruzeci de ani?
translations.es: ¿Qué factores debería considerar cuidadosamente una persona antes de realizar un cambio de carrera significativo a los cuarenta años?
translations.it: Quali fattori dovrebbe ponderare attentamente una persona prima di effettuare un cambiamento di carriera significativo nella quarantina?
translations.de: Welche Faktoren sollte eine Person sorgfältig abwägen, bevor sie in den Vierzigern einen bedeutenden Berufswechsel vornimmt?
